children.label: A
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security and the Committee on Armed Services in the House of Representatives; and

children.label: B
children.text: the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs and the Committee on Armed Services in the Senate.

children.heading: Critical infrastructure
children.label: 2 Critical infrastructure
children.text: The term “critical infrastructure” has the meaning given that term in .section 5195c(e) of title 42

children.heading: Department
children.label: 3 Department
children.text: The term “Department” means the Department of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Director
children.label: 4 Director
children.text: The term “Director” means the Director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency of the Department.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 5 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Homeland Security.

children.heading: Sector Risk Management Agency1So in original. Probably should be “(6)”.1
children.label: 7 Sector Risk Management Agency1So in original. Probably should be “(6)”.1
children.text: The term “Sector Risk Management Agency” has the meaning given the term in .section 650 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: review the current framework for securing critical infrastructure, as described in and Presidential Policy Directive 21; andsection 652(c)(4) of this title

children.label: aa
children.text: evaluate the current framework for securing critical infrastructure referred to in subparagraph (A); and

children.label: AA
children.text: revise the current list of critical infrastructure sectors designated pursuant to Presidential Policy Directive 21, any successor or related document, or policy; or

children.label: BB
children.text: identify and designate any subsectors of such sectors;

children.label: II
children.text: the data, metrics, and other information used to develop the recommendations required under clause (ii); and

children.label: aa
children.text: the current framework for securing critical infrastructure referred to in subparagraph (A);

children.label: bb
children.text: the current list of critical infrastructure sectors designated pursuant to Presidential Policy Directive 21, any successor or related document, or policy; or

children.label: cc
children.text: the identification and designation of any subsectors of such sectors; and

children.label: II
children.text: any revisions to the list of designated Federal departments or agencies that serve as the Sector Risk Management Agency for a sector or subsector of such section, necessary to comply with paragraph (3)(B).

children.label: A
children.text: evaluate the current list of designated critical infrastructure sectors and subsectors of such sectors and the appropriateness of Sector Risk Management Agency designations, as set forth in Presidential Policy Directive 21, any successor or related document, or policy; and

children.label: i
children.text: revisions to the current list of designated critical infrastructure sectors or subsectors of such sectors; and

children.label: ii
children.text: revisions to the designation of any Federal department or agency designated as the Sector Risk Management Agency for a sector or subsector of such sector.

children.heading: Review and revision by the President
children.label: 3 Review and revision by the President
A
children.text: review the recommendation and revise, as appropriate, the designation of a critical infrastructure sector or subsector or the designation of a Sector Risk Management Agency; and

children.label: i
children.text: an explanation with respect to the basis for accepting or rejecting the recommendations of the Secretary; and

children.label: I
children.text: evaluate the current framework for securing critical infrastructure referred to in paragraph (1)(A); and

children.label: AA
children.text: the list of critical infrastructure sectors designated pursuant to Presidential Policy Directive 21, any successor or related document, or policy; or

children.label: BB
children.text: the designation of any subsectors of such sectors; and

children.label: bb
children.text: the recommendations of the Secretary.

children.heading: Publication
children.label: 4 Publication
children.text: Any designation of critical infrastructure sectors shall be published in the Federal Register.

children.label: A
children.text: be a reference to the Sector Risk Management Agency of the relevant critical infrastructure sector; and

children.label: B
children.text: have the meaning given such term in .section 650 of this title

children.heading: Report and auditing
children.label: d Report and auditing
children.text: Not later than two years after and every four years thereafter for 12 years, the Comptroller General of the United States shall submit to the Committee on Homeland Security of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs of the Senate a report on the effectiveness of Sector Risk Management Agencies in carrying out their responsibilities under .January 1, 2021section 665d of this title
